name: Tomsk Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the snows of Siberia and the silver mineral wealth of the region
the taiga forests of the oblast
the gold of the oblast arms

description: A white field with green vertical stripes, bearing the coat of arms of Tomsk Oblast — a horse — at the centre.
history: The flag of Tomsk Oblast was adopted in 1997. The colour scheme reflects the natural environment of southern Siberia and the historical Tomsk Governorate.
